title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Gord Kerr
text:
This is the best Hospital.
I was in and out in less than 3 hrs
Saw a Nuroligest,  had cat scan, saw Carioligest,  had EKG.
Then got prescription for high BP
Also 3 days later Doctor came to Hotel for BP test all good.
Amazing service and inexpensive

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Mariella Shepherd
text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 100% Recommended!

Doctor Cusco was incredible. He responded immediately every time we needed help, which is essential when traveling with kids. My 12-year-old son got sick twice during our trip, and both times he guided us with clear, professional advice. One night, my daughter developed throat pain and I noticed what looked like an infection. Even though it was very late, he replied right away, reviewed the picture I sent, consulted a specialist, and explained clearly that it was safe to manage at home. (I have a nursing degree from the USA, and I truly appreciated the thoroughness of his care something you rarely find when away from home.)

He communicated perfectly in both English and Spanish (English for my husband and Spanish for me, we both were messaging him!), was extremely knowledgeable, respectful, and caring.

If you’re in Cusco with family, having Doctor Cusco’s support is invaluable. We always felt safe and well cared for. Highly recommend!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Regina Galieva
text:
Dr. Cusco provided truly exceptional medical care. He handled my referral case with the highest level of professionalism and attention to detail, carefully reviewing my medical history and taking the time to answer all of my questions thoroughly. His knowledge and expertise were immediately evident, and he explained everything clearly and thoughtfully.

In addition, all required paperwork was completed incredibly quickly and efficiently, which made the entire process smooth and stress-free. Dr. Cusco was extremely reliable, responsive, and organized throughout. Most importantly, he was genuinely kind, supportive, and reassuring, which made a significant difference in my experience.

I am very grateful for his care and would highly recommend Dr. Cusco to anyone seeking an attentive, knowledgeable, and compassionate physician.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Brayan Rosbert Salas Hilares
text: I was treated for altitude sickness by Dr. David during a hotel visit. He provided oxygen and medication, explained everything clearly, and helped me feel better quickly. Professional, efficient, and very reassuring care. Highly recommended if you need medical help in Cusco.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Lana
text:
Doctor Cusco was extremely kind hearted and willing to help me get well from my situation. All the staff are checking, making sure I was comfortable and warm. I recommend Doctor Cusco to anyone seeking medical care in Cusco. The staff did not speak that much english but were very willing to translate everything. Lab results were quick and they drove me back to my hostel at night for assurance of my safety.
Thank you.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: K Estabrooks
text: The service I received from Dr. Cusco was simply amazing.  Response times were very fast, the Doctor arrived at my AirBNB very quickly, provided a comprehensive assessment and brought an oxygen tank that I rented due to altitude sickness.  The prices I thought were entirely reasonable and the service was excellent.  I would highly recommend this to anyone.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Natasha Nikolic
text: Very prompt and excellent communication. Within two hours of calling the doctor came to our hotel and did an entire checkup along with a nurse that took blood tests on the spot, receiving the results a few hours later. The communication remained great throughout the treatment I was given. They also provided all the reports and forms through email which made it very easy to understand everything. Highly recommended especially when away from home and things don’t go as planned.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Keyur Patel
text:
We had an excellent experience with this doctor in Cusco. My wife was struggling with the altitude, and he arrived at our place within 30 minutes, fully prepared with an oxygen tank and the necessary medication. His calm and professional approach made a stressful situation much easier.

He also followed up by sending a detailed billing document by email, which made it simple to file our insurance claim.

Highly recommended for anyone who needs prompt and reliable medical care in Cusco.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Liam O’Connell
text:
I was backpacking through South America and became ill while in Cusco. I found the Doctor Cusco online and sent a message through WhatsApp, they responded within 10 minutes and I received a doctors appointment with Dr. Quispe.

The treatment and practices by both doctors and nurses were very professional. I am very glad I found this place and would recommend to anyone in need of medical care in Cusco!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Emilija Gelgotaite
text: Very professional and fast response. In 20 minutes nurse was in my hotel with all the help. I needed oxygen tank, so doctor himself delivered it very fast. Amazing team, highly recommend! Thank you

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Theodore Anderson
text: Had an amazing experience with Doctor Cusco. Having been my first time being ill abroad and being far from home, I was fairly worried about my health. I was put at ease and put on the right medication to make me feel so much better, receiving the very best care. Thank you!!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Aaron Shepherd
text:
I’ll be honest; I was skeptical at first. Seeing over 100 perfect five star reviews without even a single four star review almost felt too good to be true. But after meeting David (Doctor Cusco), I understood right away. His passion for his work is unmatched, and the level of care he provides is unlike anything we’ve ever experienced in the U.S. healthcare system.

What impressed me most was how unbelievably responsive he was. In other countries we’ve traveled to you might wait hours or even days or never hear back at all via on WhatsApp! With Dr. Cusco, he responded immediately, every single time. That kind of responsiveness made all the difference when traveling with family in a foreign country/exotically remote place like Cusco.

We were in Cusco and the Sacred Valley for over a month and ended up using his services several times. He always started with a phone consultation, and if needed, he came directly to us whether at our Airbnb or hotel. Having a doctor willing to come to you is a rare and invaluable service, especially when traveling abroad.

Our trip could have turned into a nightmare, but Dr. Cusco helped make it an amazing experience. I cannot recommend him highly enough. We even recommended him to other families we met along the way.

This is actually the first time my wife and I both felt compelled to leave separate reviews, so that future travelers could see both of our perspectives.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Shyam Bajpai
text: During our trip to Peru last month, we realized we needed an oxygen concentrator to cope with the altitude in Cuso and the Sacred Valley.We contacted Dr. David of Doctor Cusco, who very promptly arranged for the device,  and was ready with it on our arrival in Cusco.We used it for 6 days, and when there was a minor problem with it , Dr. David  personally came and provided us with a replacement at 10:30pm ! He was also  happy  to answer our concerns  about the best way to deal with the higher altitudes  at Lake Titicaca/Puno. We have ben vrey impressed by his professionalism and promptness, and would recommend Doctor Cusco to anyone who needs medical support in Cusco.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: f lava
text:
Docteur Cuzco  has been amazing . I was sick This morning and try to contact him on WhatsApp on a saturday morning . One hour after, he was at my Airbnb  visiting me and Checking all my symptôms. He managed to send someone taking bloodtest at my plàce and by 3 pm With the résults, he was able to provide me the prescription
His english is perfect and he is really Clear and pédagogical
Thank you

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Nerissa Hoi
text: I contacted Dr. Cusco's office via WhatsApp and received a quick response and efficient arrangement for my appointment. The doctors are highly professional and made me feel comfortable throughout the process. It’s excellent service for travelers! I appreciate their promptness and dedication to patient care!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Kate Turk
text: I had an eye injury, and after messaging the clinic representative on WhatsApp (which was so easy), I saw an ophthalmologist late at night, who came into the clinic just for me. She was incredibly knowledgeable and kind, and I received exceptional care. Very thankful for this clinic!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Angelica Rodriguez
text: Doctor David came through for us so promptly when I had no idea how to help my son with altitude sickness. He was patient, kind, calmed and reassured me when I was a mess. Once we did what he recommended, my son was finally comfortable and able to start to heal! He was so professional and truly cared! Thank you Doctor!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Altiverse
text:
Phenomenal service.
You get an English-speaking doctor who basically becomes your personal medical coordinator, he’s the one booking whatever specialist you need, accompanying you in person to the medical center, and translating everything the specialist says with real medical understanding.

FAST! And responsive. No waiting for answers while your health is on the line.

All documents including diagnosis, treatment plan and billing are sent virtually the same day, translated and making insurance submission really easy. I've had everything fully refunded with no questions from insurance thanks to the clarity of the documents.

Also the doctor is just really nice :) You get a sense of security that you're being taken care of, which is very important during a medical crisis.

10/5, the ratings are real, even if the AI images are slightly sketchy 🙂

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Bruce Lilly
text: I had a small medical issue while in Cusco where my prescription ran out and I needed more. Dr. David Quispe offered me advice and guided me in getting it taken care of. His English is excellent and he is very professional and knowledgeable. He saved me!!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Steven Bostelaar
text: After a trip to the jungle I had severe stomach problems. When it didnt get better after a couple of days, I contacted Doctor Cusco. Within a hour they had time for me at their clinic and diagnosed and helped me. Thnx Doctor Chris and staff :)

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Magnus Egelund
text: I contacted David regarding concerns of diabetes. He responded immediately and got me the right tests and consultation. They helped me with travel insurance and made me spend the night at the hospital to help me get my levels to normal and made me feel very secure. Very professional.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Dave Korman
text: A great experience. Booking was very smooth and easy. The doctor was very personable and thorough, genuinely took an interest in my health and comfort and spoke great English.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: William Turner
text: One afternoon while on vacation in Cusco I came down with severe gastronomic distress that worsened overnight. I wasn't sure how I was going to get to a doctor the next day. Fortunately an internet seach turned up Doctor Cusco, who makes house calls. Two clinicians appeared at my hotel room within 45 minutes of my call, drew blood for analysis, hooked me up with an IV feed for fluids and medications, diagnosed me with salmanella, and left me with five days of antibiotic pills. I was improving by the end of the day and much better by next morning. I was highly impressed by the prompt response, by the knowledge and professionalism of the staff who visited me, and also by the surprisingly low cost. I would highly recommend Doctor Cusco to anyone needing medical services in Cusco.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Matt Kelley
text: Dr Cusco is a wonderful doctor. I was having a mix of flu and altitude symptoms at the same time. He was able to help me on the spot and provided me with meds that have already treated my symptoms—super kind, professional, and personable. If you ever need to see a medical professional in Cusco, don’t look elsewhere. Thank you, Dr.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Nikki Hallam
text: Doctor Cusco was extremely helpful, I contacted via WhatsApp and received immediate response and advice. Highly recommend to anyone is Cusco who finds themselves in a medical situation.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Michal Ucko
text: As a tourist seeking medical advice/help, Dr. Cusco is the place I recommend going. Communication via WhatsApp (in English), quick response to your problem. Dr. David (English) accompanies you throughout the treatment of the problem and refers you to the professional authorities.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Rachel Murphy
text: I cannot recommend Dr Cusco medical service enough!! Dr David Quispe firstly, is a lovely person and secondly, a thoroughly professional and competent doctor. I was escorted through getting  a CT scan, a consultation with a neurologist and physiotherapy treatment all under the same roof within 24 hours. Everyone I met here was very kind to me and helped to organise the costs through my insurance. I never felt I safer hands at home or abroad! Many thanks to everyone.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Erica
text: I had an urgent eye issue (worsened floaters and blurry vision due to high altitude at Rainbow Mountain) and felt helpless. Thanks to ChatGPT, I found Doctor Cuzco. I got a reply via WhatsApp within a minute, and everything — from guidance to appointment — was arranged in just 10 minutes. The whole process was incredibly smooth and efficient. The doctor and nurse were kind, attentive, and highly professional. The examination was thorough, and the treatment helped me continue my trip safely. Truly grateful to Dr. Laurel, Dr. Coa and the whole team. Highly recommend Doctor Cuzco for their outstanding care and service!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: elloisda
text: I arrived in Cusco and had some Problems acclimmating with The altitude and struggled with headaches. Unfortunately I Felt worse over days and was short breathing - Before doing the salkantay Trek, I contacted dr Cusco via WhatsApp to get an appointment and I am Very lucky I did! For The Same day I came to The Clínic to Dr quispe and His Team, where They really listened to me and took My Symptoms really seriously. The Team handled everything With Care and so professionell -  I am so grateful For Them helping me in My Situation. I stayed at The Clínic For 2 days and got there every Support I needed, emotionally and also very professionally. Thanks again so much for taking me seriously, making me feel safe and really helping me so I could continue My travel!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Chris Fleming
text:
Doctor Cusco in my experience was very helpful and professional. I contacted them via WhatsApp with some concerns I had.
We had online correspondence and they offered to arrange an in person consultation with a doctor.
This was perfect for me as I wasn't sure whether to go to a lower altitude or if I needed medical assistance, or something else.
The doctor was brilliant and I'm really happy I made contact was received in person professional advice.
Obviously every experience is relative to the individual but mine was very positive.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Yiping Zhang
text: I was able to get yellow vaccine certificate in Cusco  with the help of Dr. Cusco. It’s super good!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Dora Dr Tarcali
text: I contacted Dr. Cusco in an emergency due to gum inflammation and mild pain. They responded immediately and offered an appointment within two hours. The clinic was clean, well-equipped, and Dr. Daniel Arostegui was kind, patient, and thorough in answering all my questions. He performed an X-ray, prescribed medication, and provided a detailed report for my insurance. The cost was reasonable. I'm so grateful for his help—it truly saved my holiday. Highly recommended!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Tyler Licata
text: best doctor in Cusco !! especially if Spanish is not your first language. Highly highly recommend. Clear explanations and friendly staff

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Fabrice Vauversin
text: During my trip to Peru, I had to treat in Cusco a bacteria I had caught in France. I went to the Mac Salud clinic which quickly made analysis and discovered the Bacteria. After a first antibiotic did not cure the problem, Doctor David Quispe and Melisa took care of me, including through WhatsApp during my bus trip to Cusco, all of that without appointment! Service was exceptional and I have no words to thank them enough!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Lukas E.
text:
I visited the clinic to address my food poisoning, and I was impressed by the friendly and professional doctor. He took the time to ask detailed questions and explained everything clearly in perfect English. The doctor also conducted a test to determine whether the issue was due to parasites or bacteria, ensuring the right medication was prescribed. Additionally, I received a detailed receipt and report for my insurance, which was very helpful. The entire experience was exceptional.

PS: I'm not sure though if the AI-generated images on the Google Maps profile are necessary ;)

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Victor Villacrez
text:
Exceptional Medical Care in Cusco – A Trusted Partner for Travelers

As an organization that brings numerous groups to Cusco for cultural, academic, scientific, and sister city exchanges, Sacred Travel has consistently relied on Dr. Cusco for top-tier medical support. Their team, led by Dr. David Quispe, has proven to be a reliable, professional, and compassionate medical service provider in Cusco, the Sacred Valley, and the highlands.

One of the standout qualities of Dr. Cusco is their ability to deliver fast, efficient, and affordable care—a critical factor for travelers needing immediate medical attention. Whether it’s providing medical-grade oxygen for altitude-related symptoms or prescribing medications for gastrointestinal issues, their team has been invaluable in ensuring the well-being of our travelers.

Another significant advantage is their proficiency in English, which allows them to accurately understand symptoms and communicate effectively with international visitors. Their mobile service—offering care directly at hotels—adds an extra layer of convenience and peace of mind for those in need of medical attention while exploring this breathtaking region.

For anyone traveling to Cusco, especially those unfamiliar with the effects of high altitude or local health challenges, Dr. Cusco is an essential contact. Their dedication to efficient, high-quality medical care ensures that visitors can focus on experiencing the wonders of the Andes with confidence, knowing they have expert healthcare support available at all times.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Angus Robertson
text: Can’t recommend Dr. Cusco enough. Dr.David was such a great doctor and manager of my HAPE. The team were very accomodating with everything and help provide a speedy recovery so I could continue travelling.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Joaquín Quispe
text: After many years, living in a coastal city, I wasn’t prepared for the altitude in Cusco. I finally visited, but I quickly felt the effects—chest pain, shortness of breath and nausea. Luckily, Dr. David was a lifesaver! Their team responded quickly, spoke very well English, and delivered an oxygen tank straight to my hotel. The service was fast, professional, what I needed to recover and continue my trip. Highly Recommended!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Markus Brändle
text: This practice is highly recommended. I had a big problem on a Saturday evening.  The consultation with the doctor took place via WhatsApp, and I received immediate and comprehensive help. I am absolutely thrilled, as this would not be possible in Germany. An absolutely brilliant service that leaves nothing to be desired.  I would love to give more than five stars.  Thank you very much.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Sofie de Koning
text: David Quispe is a phenomal, kind, and deeply knowledgeable doctor. Uses all the tricks “medicine, food, experience and sensitivity” to help you in the best way that is does not harm your body. He really listens, and checks your history thoroughly + absolutely cares about you as a human!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Sandra Harris
text: I can't speak more highly of the service we received from Doctor Cusco. My husband became extremely ill whilst we were in Cusco and I was very relieved to find a doctor who spoke fluent English.  Dr David attended our accommodation with oxygen and then immediately transported both my husband and myself to the private hospital. I was able to stay in the hospital with my husband during his three night stay and on release Dr David accompanied us on our flight to Lima so that my husband could stay on oxygen and then checked that he was okay before leaving us. All of the staff at the hospital were so friendly and helpful making a very stressful situation far better. Melissa took care off all the insurance side of things for us,  dealing directly with our insurance company so that we weren't out of pocket. Sending a huge thank you to all involved!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Sondov R Rise
text: The doctor who treated me was incredibly flexible, helpful, and compassionate. He accommodated me quickly and provided excellent care, making sure I felt comfortable and informed. His professionalism and calm demeanor made a stressful situation much easier. I’m very grateful for his help and highly recommend him

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: L Roc
text:
I am truly grateful esp to Dr David and Nurse Shirley for the exceptional care I received during my recent medical emergency in Peru. Your swift and professional response not only helped me recover quickly but also allowed us to continue with our travel itinerary as planned.

Your expertise and flexibility to visit me in the hotel with all the medical equipments and medicines made a challenging situation far less stressful, and we are sincerely  thankful.

I had a video consultation with Dr David and in one hour, they were already in the hotel.  Highly recommend for anyone needing urgent medical help in Cusco.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Markus K
text: After many unsuccessful attempts to get vaccinated in Bolivia following a dog bite, Doctor Cusco finally helped me receive my first rabies shot. The communication via WhatsApp was quick, easy, and in English, which made things so much smoother here in Peru. Highly recommended for travelers in need of medical help!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Neta Sivan
text:
Amazing treatment.
The doctor came to our apartment in an hour (at 22pm), then visited for the rest of the treatment every single day for another 3 days.
At last, the doctor came to make a final check.
Nice doctors, sending all the documents for the insurance in english.
Recommend!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Štěpán Kout
text: I was in Cusco and I got a strong toothache. I textef Doctor Cusco on whatsapp and they replied me very quickly and found me a great dentist. Very helpful service. Thank you

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: John Holweg
text:
I found Dr Cusco to be very helpfull and informative with my diagnosis and treatment. As my Spanish is terrible, they had Doctor David Quispe interpret with me through the whole process.
Thank you Doctor Cusco for allowing me to continue my travels in good health

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Jenna Dimitrakas
text:
Dr Quispe was responsive, caring and explained everything clearly. My treatment was very good and I recovered quickly due to the care I received.

Getting a consultation and admitted to hospital was quick and easy as soon as I messaged Dr Cusco on WhatsApp. Dr Cusco also communicated with my Travel Insurance so that the insurance paid the hospital / doctor fees directly which was very helpful.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Patrick Spillane
text: Great experience with Dr David. I came in with dysentery and he looked after eme and gave me all the right treatment to make sure I could get back travelling asap safely

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Alison Peterson
text: Altitude sickness was severe enough to seek help! We found the best doctor and nurses who gave us absolutely competent, professional, compassionate treatment, ensuring we were ready to actually enjoy our high altitude adventure. Very very grateful!!!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Megan S
text: Highly recommend Dr. David Quispe. My partner and I are from Canada and fell ill while in Cusco. I contacted him via WhatsApp and he was at our hotel room within a few hours. He was very thorough, kind and his English was great and easy to understand. Prices are extremely reasonable and he even had medication with him eliminating the need to go to the pharmacy. He sends a report so that you can send to your travel insurance company and provides all required receipts and documentation. Do not hesitate to use his service.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Louis Retief
text: My wife got Entamoeba Histolytica and was fully dehydrated after struggling at our airbnb for over 6 hours with diarrhea and nausea.  We came into hospital at 4am, quickly got triaged by a great team and got put up in a suite with two beds. One for my wife and me so we could both sleep. Their team’s care was diligent, very responsive and the doctors spoke great english. Highly recommend them for any international visits. We ended up being at hospital for 12 hours and total cost was $600 USD. We are from Canada and can safely say the care was probably better here.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Delaney
text: I never leave reviews but I will for this as I was very nervous about seeking medical assistance abroad and was pleasantly surprised at how easy it was. Dr David Quispe was excellent. Perfect communication across WhatsApp and during the consultation. Perfect English as well, explained absolutely everything, was polite and well mannered. Was able to pay by card with him there and then. Approximately £40 for the consultation. Received my prescription and got great advice. Definitely recommend his service if you are experiencing altitude sickness/symptoms.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Eric Borg
text: Dr David Quispe provided exceptional professional service when I fell ill due to food poisoning during my visit to Cusco. I was extremely satisfied with the prompt initial response I received from David and his team on WhatsApp. He assessed my situation quickly at the MacSalud clinic, and I was able to leave the hospital within 24 hours with the necessary medication in hand, feeling much better. I'm happy they kept me overnight to get the antibiotics treatment started and make sure I was fine. Melissa was very helpful in coordinating with my insurance provider so I could leave without having to pay anything upfront. Overall, it was a top-notch medical experience. David speaks fluent English and is polite, warm, and attentive to his patients' needs. He helped me save my vacation, and now I can continue to enjoy this beautiful part of the world.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: jen
text: Dr. Miguel and Dr. Piso were incredibly helpful and kind while I was sick backpacking. Highly recommend 😊

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Estrella Franco
text: Super quick and super helpful! I got everything done in 1 day. Amazing service ☺️

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Jo Wheeler
text: I spoke to the doctor on the phone one evening. He has very good English and was extremely helpful, reassuring and kind. He answered the phone immediately and, after an in-depth chat, arranged an appointment for the following morning. I recommend this service for any travellers in Cusco needing help

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Robin Wilson
text: Messaged in the morning via WhatsApp and within the hour had a consultation with a dermatologist with private translator. He was fully qualified and couldn’t recommend the entire experience enough. Smooth, efficient, professional and reasonably priced considering. Can pay by card using payment link and prescribed medication you could collect within 5 mins. Don’t consider using any other company if you’re a traveller in Cusco

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Samuel Want
text: Highly recommend for any Spanish and/or English speaking tourists who experience any health difficulties. David made us feel incredibly safe, and was extremely knowledgeable. Especially for difficulties involving altitude. Thank you David! 🙌

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Juston Noyes
text: Doctor Cusco was very quick to respond to my appointment request.  They helped me get connected same day with a local doctor/specialist in Cusco who provided care for my medical issue.  Recommend Doctor Cusco to travellers who may experience medical issues while in Peru

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Doug M
text: I am from the USA and I had an eye injury while in Cusco Puru . Dr. David Quispe from Doctor Cusco took excellent care of me . He spent the day as my personnel interpreter . Taking me to an eye specialist , getting my prescriptions and taking me back to my hotel . It would have been a huge challenge doing it on my own . He speaks excellent English and really cares about your well being . I highly recommend calling Dr. Cusco if you have any health issues while in Cusco Puru ! Thank you so much Dr. Quispe !

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Tim Turner
text: The medical team at Dr. Cusco treated my case of severe altitude sickness promptly and effectively.  Dr. Quispe effectively communicated his diagnosis and treatment plan.  He put me on intravenous fluids and I recovered within a few hours.  Dr. Quispe made me feel that he truly cared for my condition and recovery.  He followed up often to check on me and he provided instructions for me to follow after discharge from the hospital.  I was able to continue with my plans after one full day of rest.  Thanks Dr, Cusco for saving my vacation!!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Gazpacho
text:
To start, I can usually help someone sick but at this time it was too much for me. So I found Dr Cusco.
It was easy to find Dr Cusco. I connected on WhatsApp and the messaging and help was almost immediate. They stayed on line for as long as I needed them and even there after a break. I felt really supported.
Finally I asked if a Dr could come to our room and see my husband (Gary). Very quickly we were visited by Dr Quispe.
The Dr was very polite, calm, communicative, compassionate. We heard his opinion and felt we could trust him.
The Dr organised everything from there….ambulance, hospital admission, tests, administration, everything. We felt like he was near at every step.
When Gary was discharged from hospital, the Dr continued his support and care with oxygen, delivering it himself. He met the family we were travelling with and we all think Dr Quispe is wonderful.
If only we had Drs like Dr Quispe in Australia.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Melissa Pratt
text: Dr. David Quispe is one of the most kind, empathetic, and understanding doctors I have ever met. He is knowledgeable and professional. I was very sick while in Cusco and I Googled doctors and came across lots of 5 star reviews for Dr. Quispe. I sent a WhatsApp and he was at my Airbnb within the hour. I spent the night in the hospital, and his care was top notch. I felt like he listened to my concerns and figured out what was wrong with me and treated me promptly. The world needs more doctors like Dr. David Quispe. If you are in Cusco and in need of medical help, don’t hesitate to contact Dr. Quispe. He is a 5-star doctor!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Bram de Man
text: Had a very good experience with Dr. Quispe as a non Spanish speaking tourist. Woke up early in the morning in Cusco with trouble breathing, scary. (Turned out to be covid). Googled a doctor in Cusco and at first didn't know what I would end up with. Contacted at 7 am and could come for visit at 8:30. Doctor Quispe spoke English very well and was there with me for several hours while undergoing tests. Would definitely recommend in the unfortunate case you need medical assistance.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: ערן שדה
text: I really want to thank the very professional and lovely doctor who treated me, David. If you have a problem and need a doctor, then only contact David, you will benefit greatly.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Chen Yuhan
text: I ordered an oxygen tank delivery service since I feel chest pain and heart pain in when sleep. They deliver the tank very quickly! It’s really helpful to release my pain. And the price is very good. Definitely 5 star!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Mohana Sosale
text:
I fell down after tripping over the Cross bar inside a boat on my trip to the Manu National Park in March 2024. I injured my right shoulder and right lower waist areas. I was in considerable pain. Fortunately, I was able to walk. The place where I was did not have any medical facilities.  I found Doctor Cusco's contact on the web. I contacted him. He called me back on WhatsApp, assessed the situation, recommended some emergency measures and fixed an appointment for me to visit a private clinic in Cusco the next day when I was scheduled to return to Cusco. He also sent me the Estimated costs of anticipated procedures
I arrived back in Cusco at 5.30pm. Dr. David Quispe met me and took me to the clinic.
He made a professional assessment of the injuries, arranged for ultra sound and xray tests to be done on the spot to assess the damage and decide on the treatment. He then arranged a consultation with the traumatologist who was a highly qualified professional.
I was prescribed some medication and advised on the precautionary measuresto be taken as I was due to fly out the next day. He was very professional and caring in his dealings with my case. He also completed the Insurance forms as required by my insurers. All in all, it was a smooth, professional, efficient, and caring experience of treating my accidental injury.

I am happy to confirm that thanks to Dr. David Quispe and his services, I feel better and I am more confident about completing my trip as planned.

Based on my personal experience , I highly recommend the services of Dr.David Quispe at Dr.Cusco. you can rely on him to provide a high standard of private emergency medical service at reasonable charges.
Thank you Dr. David Quispe for your timely assistance and care. I am very grateful for your help
Sosale Mohana
traveller from India

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Eva Bono
text:
I recently travelled to Cusco from Australia and became severely ill. I sent Doctor Cusco an online booking enquiry and within 40 mins Dr David Quispe was at my hotel. From my very first encounter with Dr Quispe I was impressed, he was professional and thorough in his diagnoses. He spoke fluent English too which was so helpful.
He drove me to the MacSalud Private Hospital were I was hospitalised for 5 days. Being a female and travelling alone in a foreign country (where I didn’t speak the language) and being so sick was terrifying and I was in tears on many occasions. Dr Quispe checked up on me multiple times a day and thoroughly explained my situation and gave me clear advice on the next steps etc. Within 4 days under Dr Quispe’s care I was back to my usual happy self. I am confident my quick recovery was due to his thorough care of me. Thank you so much Dr Quispe, you are a kind, genuine and caring person. The world needs more Doctors like you.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Linn Guri Haarberg
text: I contacted Doctor Cusco through WhatsApp and got a quick respond. I needed to take a few examinations due to stomach issue and under 24 hours I received the results. Dr.Quispe called me for 20 minutes, and gave me a detailed information about my further treatment. I felt very seen and heard and will highly recommend contacting Dr. Cusco if you ever feel sick in Cusco. Thank you!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Kelly Hamlett
text: I had the typical Travelers gastrointestinal issues here on my second day in Cusco. We have our big Machu Picchu trip tomorrow and I was terrified I wouldn't be able to get on the bus. Dr. Quispe made a house call to my hotel within an hour and a half of my request. He was so wonderful, professional, kind and listened intently to all of my symptoms. He recommended a variety of treatments to make sure I could continue with my travels tomorrow. I would give a higher review than five stars if I could! Thank you so much for helping me today! 🙏🙏🙏🙏

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Jayne Hollier
text: I was recently in Cuzco and unbeknown to me I was suffering from Bronchitis and high blood pressure- Dr David G came to my hotel to see me within an hour of calling. He stayed for almost 2 hours to make sure my blood pressure came down and then he came back again in the evening to double check. He was very caring. I recommend very highly.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Alexandra Coveos
text: Had a great experience! The doctor took all the time to explain literally everything to me. He seemed to really care and I felt very comfortable and taken serious. 10/10 recommend

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Priyanka Kanani
text: Reaching the clinic over phone was smooth and the response time is very quick. Doctor David Quispe thoroughly inquired about my symptoms via a remote consultation phone call regarding altitude sickness and general infection symptoms. Absolutely recommend reaching out to him if you are anxious about your symptoms and need medical help in general for anything. Dr David Quispe is genuinely helpful and very generous with sharing his knowledge.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Q1nten
text: Dr Quispe was very Quick to arrive at my aibnb when my tonsils were swollen. After doing some tests he decided it was best for me to be hospitalizar. I stayed 4 days in clínica MacSalud where I was daily monitoreo by dr Quispe who kept me informed on the results of the tests and the treatment. After leaving the hospital we stayed in contact until the final check up moment after ending my antibiotics treatment. It was a very professional and warm experience.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Annora McGarry
text: Dr. Quispe and the team at MacSalud were friendly, professional, and efficient. I credit Dr Quispe and the team to saving my trip to Peru. Dr. Quispe was always available to answer any questions, and worked tirelessly to ensure I received the care needed to make a full recovery from a severe bout of altitude sickness. I can’t recommend Dr. Cusco enough for any traveler needing medical assistance in Cusco.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Nicola Oakley
text:
I’ve been fighting off stomach bugs every few days for nearly 3 weeks in Peru and my symptoms were getting worse, so I finally started searching for a doctor to talk to. I found Doctor Cusco and was able to book a free consultation via WhatsApp video call for just 90mins later.

Dr Quispe was very helpful and answered all my questions. He gave me a diagnosis and issued me a prescription. I paid Doctor Cusco a fee for the prescription (95 Soles) and I was able to go to Inkafarma shortly after my appointment to purchase the necessary medications with no issues. I would definitely use this service again if needed.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Patrick O'Brien
text: Fantastic experience with Dr. Cusco, they got me in to see a cardiologist and get a scan on the same day I reached out to them, in time to get cleared for the Inca Trail. Highly recommended!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Jan Karlsson
text:
David Quispe is the best doctor in Cusco.
He saved our vacation in Perú.
He has very good knowledge and did everything to help us so we could continue our journey.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Ulf Görrissen
text:
The MacSalud is an excellent hospital for tourists. They speak perfect english. Initial contact is easy via WhatsApp. Quick responses and even a doctor's visit to the hotel is offered.
Everything went perfectly, from the reception at the hospital to the first examination and admission to the ward. You feel very well looked after. Patients are looked after with great professional competence and empathy. Good doctors (Dr. Quispe & Dr. Gutierrez) and good nurses help with recovery.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Max Grant
text: Amazing service from start to finish Canot  fault the service amazing, dr quispe stayed with us when we seen the other consultant he translated made my wife at ease and even went to pharmacy to get prescription and explained dosage 🙌lifesaver

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Matthew Hayden
text:
Dr Quispe was incredibly helpful and responsive after we felt ill in Cusco. The communication via WhatsApp made everything easy and the process of having samples tested in the lab was very efficient.

I'd be happy enough if the process was in Spanish but the fact I could communicate in English made it even easier.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Jay Snelson
text: If you are traveling in Cusco, Doctor Cusco is very good! Fast service and explained everything in detail. They will also come to where you are staying to do any tests or collect anything from you. Highly recommend if you need a doctor here and and they also speak English!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: sam bassett
text:
Dr. Cusco was amazing! I am a New Zealander, and was travelling in Cusco and received very fast (same day!) service, involving a consultation and treatment.

Dr. Quispe was incredibly helpful and informative. Highly recommend!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Anna Rind
text: A clear recommendation if you are looking for help quickly! After feeling sick for several days, I contacted Dr. Cusco via WhatsApp. I received a reply and a call from Dr. Quispe super quickly. He consulted very competently and clearly indicated the next steps. I received the result of my illness from the laboratory and a prescription from Dr. Quispe on the same day. Thank you very much for the great and smooth support!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Aisling Healy
text: I had an issue with my foot and couldn't walk on it so needed quick help. They came back to me really quickly and the doctor called out same day and very thorough and took a lot of time to investigate the issue and ensure everything was ok and will have a quick recovery. Highly recommend if you need a doctor here in Cusco.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Gab Rogers
text: My friend had altitude sickness and a food borne illness at the same time. Dr. David was so kind and effective. He made both of us feel like we knew what was going on. We love him!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Jayden P
text:
We dealt with Doctor Cusco who linked us with Doctor Cruz, they cery very professional & easy to deal with.
We could not recommend Dr Cusco & Dr. Cruz enough!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Leanne Hayter
text: Best medical service I have ever received, worldwide. Very responsive to my needs for blood tests whilst in a foreign country - it was all sorted out via WhatsApp and email within minutes. If there were 10 stars I'd give it! Thank you Doctor Quispe.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Emma Padget
text:
Dr David Quispe saw me within 1 hour of me contacting him. He provided excellent service and speaks excellent English.
Highly recommend.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Alexandra Sipos
text: Dr David Quispe is very professional, kind and the medical examination was outstanding and really precise. The communication via WhatsApp went smoothly and quickly. Thank you for the exceptional support!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Mitchell Posthumus
text:
Have no fear, Dr. David is hear! Jokes aside, I got sick in Cusco, far away from home which was quite scary. I don't speak spanish... but D'r. David came to my apartment and did a professional check on me. 1 hour later a nurse came to check my blood.

David checked on me every morning through WhatsApp. Top notch service!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: דוד ציבולבסקי
text: Dr David is one of the best doctors I’ve seen in all of the South America, really nice,reliable,helping and the price is really fair. I recommend everyone to come to him and experience a really good doctor.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: William Irwen Bourdillon
text: Excellent service. Whilst on holiday in Cusco developed symptoms of DVT. Doctor arranged immediate appointment and then sorted hospitalisation. Really helpful and responsive when sorting out medical assistance and insurance.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: כפיר בן הרועה
text: Dr. David Quispe, treated me when a I had a case of salmonela and giardia. Very kind, professional, and informative. Even drove me to the airport after I got out. Highly recommend

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Alaneloyf
text: For sure you are gonna feel the highness in cusco. Dont worry you have doctor cusco for you. The are gonna guide you for free if you are afraid of high attitude sickness. They always try to take care of you day after day. Also they can visit you at your hostel and check you out. My mother language is spanish they also speak a perfect english

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Jack Kaelin
text: I had such piece of mind after speaking with this group. They gave me a referral after a mild health scare and in a few hours my trip was back on track. Thanks a million, would highly recommend them for anyone traveling in Peru.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Amy Wren
text: I went to the dermatologist and was extremely satisfied with the service! I was accompanied by a translator who was very friendly and helpful. The doctor was very thorough and precise. Would highly recommend!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Julie I
text: I had an issue with getting a vaccine exemption for my trip to Bolivia and ask over 10 medical clinics for help. This was the only one that actually seemed to care and help. 10/10

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Magnus Ims
text: Very competent and helpful doctor. Provided good informed answers to all my questions, and was intently set on giving me the best treatment.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Marisa Ioannou
text: This doctor is so helpful. I got results back the same day as having tests and then the necessary prescription in the same day. He is really informative and reassuring too.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Gustavo Mora
text: Dr. David was an excellent professional and he provided a really quick assistance when I needed. Highly recommended!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Ben Wells
text: Fantastic service for anyone who needs quick medical attention, be it a routine checkup or more serious situations. I would highly recommend!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Ben Chamberlayne
text: Fantastic doctor, sorted us out in less than 24 hours and saved our holiday! Would recommend

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Phili Stöveken (Phil)
text: got an appointment same day and very friendly and competent assistance throughout.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Mads Kinch-Jensen
text: Very nice people and good treatment, felt save alle the way

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Hassan Benboubker
text: Excellent professionals, eager to help and very honest ! 100% recommended

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Margaux Dalimier
text: Helpful, quick and very kind! It saves you a trip and a holiday!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Jeimy Neira
text: Excellent treat, highly recommended!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Jacob Gallie
text: Great service.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Kevin L
text: Very good doctor. He helped me with everything and explained the situation very well.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Ralf Burgstahler
text: Dr. Cusco is offering highly professional service, great communcation and support. Very content :-)

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Kris
text: Great experience. Dr. Cusco answered all of my questions. Very attentive and fast results.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Emily Tudor
text: Dr Cusco was incredibly helpful, fast and efficient. Their communication was fast and clear, the actual appointment was straight forward and the results came back fast. I would highly recommend them for travelers!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: K L
text: 100% Empfehlung!! Super schnelle Reaktion auf meine Anfrage und unfassbar professionelle Beratung, Anamnese und Behandlung. Sogar für die „Nachsorge“ war Doctor Cusco jederzeit schnell erreichbar.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Ann Kristin
text: Das Team von Doctor Cusco hat mich wunderbar versorgt und alles dafür getan meine Schmerzen zu lindern. Ich bin sehr dankbar und empfehle jedem bei Krankheiten vorbei zu kommen.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: DAVID QUISPE
text: Una plataforma médica eficiente para encontrar asistencia médica en Cusco. Contactar a un ortopedista, oftalmólogo, dermatólogo, urólogo o un cirujano plástico nunca fue tan fácil. Si no puedes hablar español, estamos listos para ayudarte en tu idioma. Si moverte de tu hotel es imposible, tenemos toda la capacidad de atenderte en la comodidad de tu habitación. Al finalizar la atención tendrás los documentos necesarios para presentarlos a su seguro de viajes. Disfruta Cusco con seguridad y tranquilidad. Doctor-Cusco, Your Health a Click Away!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Chr V
text:
Wir haben ärztliche Unterstützung benötigt. Nach ein paar kurzen Nachrichten über WhatsApp, hat Frau Dr. Chris Bolivar einen Hausbesuch in unseren Hotel gemacht. Sie hat sich 3 Stunden Zeit genommen und eine super Versorgung gewährleistet. Blutergebnisse waren nach weniger als 2 Stunden da. Am nächsten Tag hat sich Dr. Quispe noch viel Zeit für uns in der Klinik genommen.
Danke für die gute Behandlung! Das Team war sogar bemüht, alle Formalitäten mit der Auslandskrankenversicherung zu klären.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Baptiste Compper-Elinck
text:
Le Dr. Cristian Sucasaca R. a fait preuve d'un grand professionnalisme lors des examens. Son assistante a également été très aidante notamment dans les démarches administratives avec mon assureur.

Service de grande qualité, je recommande.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Andreas Beckert
text:
Konnte Nachts nicht schlafen, da jedesmal nach dem einschlafen die Atmung aussetzte.
Doc David ist ins Hotel gekommen und hat die Höhenkrankheit diagnostiziert.
Er hat mir Tabletten und Sauerstoff verschrieben.
Vielen Dank David, hat geholfen.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Jenny Vigil
text:
My symptoms were chest pain. Hard to breathe. Diarrhea. Nausea. Vomit due to the altitude. I had to keep my hotel room warm. Oxygen level went down to 77. With Dr. Cusco helped me so much! They drop off and pick up the oxygen tank at your hotel… without them I wouldn’t survive beautiful Cusco.

Mis síntomas eran dolor en el pecho, dificultad para respirar, diarrea, náuseas y vómitos debido a la altitud. Tuve que mantener caliente la habitación del hotel. El nivel de oxígeno bajó a 77. ¡El Dr. Cusco me ayudó mucho!  Traen y recogen el tanque de oxygen ha tu habitación en tu hotel… sin ellos no sobreviviría a la hermosa ciudad de Cusco.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Maina Cruz
text:
Parfait ! J’ai contacté Doctor Cusco quelques jours avant d’arriver dans la ville, un échange hyper réactif et une disponibilité immédiate pour un rendez-vous un peu spécifique nécessaire.
J’ai été accompagné du Dr. David Quispe qui fut très gentil et professionnel tout au long de mon rendez-vous et qui m’a même accompagné dans toutes les démarches vis à vis de l’assurance. N’hésitez pas !

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Betsy Jakelin Laines Medina
text: Estuve con mi hermana en Cusco en las vacaciones y necesitábamos de la atención de un odontólogo certificado que pueda extraerle la muela del juicio. Encontramos este servicio que fue excelente y en unas horas ya mi novio estaba mejor. Agradezco mucho su atención. Fue muy profesional!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Thomas Groeteke
text:
Wir hatten uns wegen Symptomen der Höhenkrankheit an Dr. Cusco gewendet. Die Kontaktaufnahme ging unkompliziert über WhatsApp und auch sehr wichtig auf Englisch.
Wir konnten unsere Symptome schildern und hatten sofort eine kompetente Beratung, da diese Krankheit in Cusco öfter vorkommt. Wir bekamen abgestufte Vorschläge für Behandlungen (Sauerstoff, Pillen, Abstieg von Cusco ins Heilige Tal). Das war für uns sehr hilfreich, denn wir sind kein Fan davon, jedes Symptom mit Pillen zu unterdrücken.
Wir konnten sogar über mehrere Tage in Kontakt bleiben und unsere "Behandlung" aktuell mit dem Arzt absprechen und anpassen.
Wir können die Nutzung von Dr. Cusco uneingeschränkt empfehlen

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Nelly Eytan
text: רופא מעולה, הגיע עד ההוסטל, עוזר ממש זמין לכל שאלה. יודע אנגלית ממש טוב. ממליצה ממש!!!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Julie G
text: Absolument parfait ! En prenant l'avion pour le Pérou j'ai eu de grosses douleurs aux oreilles. Après avoir contacté le secrétariat via WhatsApp, j'ai pu avoir le rendez-vous le lendemain chez un spécialiste. Dr. Daniel Rondan et Dr. David Quispe m'ont accompagnés et aidés tout au long du rendez-vous. Le secrétariat m'a ensuite transmis l'ensemble des documents pour l'assurance quelques heures après le rendez-vous. Merci infiniment !

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Léa Pht (LeaEcritSaVie)
text:
Quel soulagement de trouver un si bon docteur lorsque nous sommes en voyage.
Le docteur David Quispe a été à l’écoute, gentils, rassurant. Il parle parfaitement anglais ce qui facilite la communication. Il m’a tout très bien expliqué, c’était très clair. Il a rapidement posé le bon diagnostic qui expliquait les vertiges dont je souffrais depuis plusieurs semaines. J’ai obtenu un rendez vous très rapidement, il a été très réactif.
De plus, il a continué de m’aider les jours qui ont suivi la consultation, en prenant de mes nouvelles et en m’aidant à prendre un rendez vous chez un spécialiste ORL dans une autre ville. Je suis extrêmement reconnaissante de l’avoir rencontré et le remercie sincèrement pour son aide dont je me souviendrai longtemps. Si vous avez besoin de voir un docteur, n’hésitez pas à le consulter, il est probablement le meilleur qui puisse s’occuper de vous!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Rico Cavadini
text: Meine Frau und ich reisen durch Teile Südamerikas. Bereits 5 Tage vor Cusco hatte meine Frau ein medizinisches Problem. Da wir in Cusco in zwei Tagen den Salkantay Trek machen wollten und es meiner Frau nicht besser ging, googelten wir nach einem Arzt in Cusco. Unsere Kontaktaufnahme via WhatsApp wurde sehr schnell beantwortet und innert kürzester Zeit hatten wir Kontakt mit Dr. Quispe. Noch am selben Morgen kam eine Krankenschwester ins Hotel um Proben abzunehmen. Bis am Mittag erhielten wir von Dr. Quispe den ersten Befund. Für die abschliessenden Untersuchungen und Besprechung der weiteren Schritte kam Dr. Quispe Anfang Nachmittag ins Hotel. Dank dieser schnellen und kompetenten Behandlung stand dem Trekking nichts im Wege. Wir können den Service jederzeit bestens empfehlen!

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Eugeny Kuzakov
text: Esses lindos médicos basicamente me salvaram. Eu estava exausto. Obrigado@

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Matias Minetti
text: Excelente servicio. El médico vino hasta mi alojamiento y me trajo oxígeno. Al otro día pude hacer la excursión de machu picchu perfectamente.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Jules Puig
text: Prise en charge rapide et efficace, le médecin parle anglais, je recommande !

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: AC Graphic Anthony Coquet
text: Merci au docteur David. Il est venu à domicile rapidement et parle anglais en plus de l'espagnol, donc aucun soucis de compréhension. Très prévenant et très professionnel

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Tim Fischer
text:
Hervorragender medizinischer Service!

+ Kontaktaufnahme unkompliziert via Online-Formular, anschließend telefonisch oder via Whatsapp (jederzeit erreichbar)

+ perfekt englisch sprechender, lokal sehr gut vernetzter und kompetenter Allgemeinarzt (kann ich einschätzen, bin selbst ärztlicher Kollege) koordiniert anschließend alles von Diagnostik bis Therapie, sei es ambulant (Praxis, Labor), stationär oder sogar ambulant im Hotel, er dient dabei auch als Übersetzer

+ zum Abschluss gibt es eine (englische, in Zukunft ggf. auch deutsche) Rechnung in der alle Leistungen akkurat aufgelistet sind sowie einen perfekten Arztbrief —> die Beantragung der Kostenübernahme durch die Reisekrankenversicherung ist somit problemlos (er prüft anfangs sogar selbstständig, ob eine direkte Kostenübernahme möglich ist)

Wirklich hervorragender Service, in der Form deutlich patientenorientierter als das ambulante System zuhause in Deutschland 😊

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Elisa Bauden
text: Le docteur David Quispe m’a reçu alors qu’il travaillait au SAMU et non à son cabinet, il m’a examiné gratuitement puis m’a fait une ordonnance après passage au laboratoire. Rapide, efficace et à l’écoute 😊 Merci

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Emily Martinez
text: Atención rápida, buen servicio y muy atentos a todo.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: sandrita castillo
text: Tout a été parfait le médecin m'a rassuré et a bien fini le traitement. Merci beaucoup 🙏🏻

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Boris Jeanney
text: David était vraiment super, attentionné et réalise un suivi de qualité !

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Rainer Finke
text: Sehr gutes Beratungsgespräch und Hilfe erhalten.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Jim Brian Valencia Garcia
text: Exelente, rápido y profesional.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: Gabriela Huaman Fanola
text: Excelente servicio, rápido y seguro. Estuve con mi familia en Cusco y uno de nosotros estuvo mal de altura, afortunadamente encontramos un doctor en cusco que pudo atendernos en nuestro hotel e inclusive nos dejaron un balón de oxígeno. Gracias al Dr. David Quispe pudimos viajar a Machupicchu y conocer las maravillas de este país. Muy recomendado.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
name: María Alejandra Miranda Chirau
text:
Rápido y eficiente.
Tuve un viaje a Brasil y me exigían la vacuna contra la fiebre amarilla; pude tener la vacuna y el certificado internacional de vacunación en menos de 30 minutos desde que los contacté. Definitivamente la mejor opción.

title: DOCTOR CUSCO - Urgent Care Clinic International
